insertion_point: after the frozen action scores and before action selection
proposed_role: remove actions that are invalid in the current scenario
host_input_semantics: ordered action scores paired with a shared action ontology
host_output_semantics: filtered scores over the unchanged action vocabulary
semantic_mapping: the module uses the same action identifiers and ordering as the baseline
adapter: a named action identifier join checks ontology coverage before filtering
predicted_effect: reduce intent violations caused by structurally invalid choices
failure_mode: an incomplete ontology may suppress a necessary action
